languages.text:
The familiar immediately restores 100% Wounds. The familiar is also resurrected if it has 0 Wounds. The next 3 Overseer abilities cost -1 AP.
Until the end of combat, the Overseer's allies benefit from the {g|f:5fcfda67ccb14a66a0ff79d2b9ee250c}Scried{/g} status applied to the enemies. Also, the allies in the Servoskull Swarm's {g|f:215d9f42b7e6435e9ed77337156e0fc3}Expanded{/g} area are immune to crits.

traits.locale_text:
The familiar immediately restores 100% Wounds. The familiar is also resurrected if it has 0 Wounds. The next 3 Overseer abilities cost -1 AP.
Until the end of combat, the Overseer's allies benefit from the {g|f:5fcfda67ccb14a66a0ff79d2b9ee250c}Scried{/g} status applied to the enemies. Also, the allies in the Servoskull Swarm's {g|f:215d9f42b7e6435e9ed77337156e0fc3}Expanded{/g} area are immune to crits.

languages.text:
The servo-skull swarm immediately heals to full {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} (even if it has 0 wounds). The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}'s next three {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g} cost −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} less.
Until the end of combat, the Overseer's allies also ignore the {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g} of enemies that are {g|f:5fcfda67ccb14a66a0ff79d2b9ee250c}under surveillance{/g}. Additionally, allies within a 4-cell radius around the servo-skull swarm are immune to {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hits{/g}.

languages.text:
Рой сервочерепов немедленно полностью восстанавливает {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}здоровье{/g} (даже при 0 здоровья). Три следующие {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}способности{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}надзирателя{/g} требуют на 1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}ОД{/g} меньше.
До конца боя союзники надзирателя также игнорируют {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}укрытие{/g} противников {g|f:5fcfda67ccb14a66a0ff79d2b9ee250c}под наблюдением{/g}. Кроме того, союзники в радиусе 4 клеток вокруг роя сервочерепов не получают {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}критических попаданий{/g}.
languages.original_text:

Until the end of combat, the Overseer's allies also ignore the {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g} of enemies that are {g|f:5fcfda67ccb14a66a0ff79d2b9ee250c}under surveillance{/g}. Additionally, allies within a 4-cell radius around the servo-skull swarm are immune to {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hits{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Рой сервочерепов немедленно полностью восстанавливает здоровье (даже при 0 здоровья). Три следующие способности надзирателя требуют на 1 ОД меньше.
До конца боя союзники надзирателя также игнорируют укрытие противников {g|f:5fcfda67ccb14a66a0ff79d2b9ee250c}под наблюдением{/g}. Кроме того, союзники в радиусе 4 клеток вокруг роя сервочерепов не получают критических попаданий.

Рой сервочерепов немедленно полностью восстанавливает здоровье (даже при 0 здоровья). Три следующие способности надзирателя требуют на 1 ОД меньше.
До конца боя союзники надзирателя также игнорируют укрытие противников {g|f:5fcfda67ccb14a66a0ff79d2b9ee250c}под наблюдением{/g}. Кроме того, союзники в радиусе 4 клеток вокруг роя сервочерепов не получают критических попаданий.

languages.text:
Der Servoschädel-Schwarm regeneriert seine {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}Wunden{/g} vollständig (selbst wenn er 0 Wunden hat). Die nächsten drei {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}Fähigkeiten{/g} des {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Aufsehers{/g} kosten -1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} weniger.
Bis zum Ende des Kampfes ignorieren Verbündete des Aufsehers die {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}Deckung{/g} von Gegnern, die {g|f:5fcfda67ccb14a66a0ff79d2b9ee250c}unter Beobachtung{/g} stehen. Außerdem sind Verbündete in einem Radius von 4 Feldern um den Servoschädel-Schwarm gegen {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}kritische Treffer{/g} immun.
languages.original_text:
The servo-skull swarm immediately heals to full {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} (even if it has 0 wounds). The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}'s next three {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g} cost −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} less.
Until the end of combat, the Overseer's allies also ignore the {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g} of enemies that are {g|f:5fcfda67ccb14a66a0ff79d2b9ee250c}under surveillance{/g}. Additionally, allies within a 4-cell radius around the servo-skull swarm are immune to {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hits{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Der Servoschädel-Schwarm regeneriert seine Wunden vollständig (selbst wenn er 0 Wunden hat). Die nächsten drei Fähigkeiten des Aufsehers kosten -1 AP weniger.
Bis zum Ende des Kampfes ignorieren Verbündete des Aufsehers die Deckung von Gegnern, die {g|f:a115669547864ccc816f0598a404e816}unter Beobachtung{/g} stehen. Außerdem sind Verbündete in einem Radius von 4 Feldern um den Servoschädel-Schwarm gegen kritische Treffer immun.

languages.text:
L'essaim de servocrânes régénère immédiatement toute sa réserve de {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}blessures{/g} (même s'il n'en a aucune). Le coût des trois prochaines {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}capacités{/g} du {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}surveillant{/g} est réduit de −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}PA{/g}.
Jusqu'à la fin du combat, les alliés du surveillant ignorent la {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}couverture{/g} des ennemis {g|f:5fcfda67ccb14a66a0ff79d2b9ee250c}sous surveillance{/g}. De plus, les alliés dans un rayon de 4 cases autour de l'essaim de servocrânes bénéficient d'une immunité contre les {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}coups critiques{/g}.
languages.original_text:
The servo-skull swarm immediately heals to full {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} (even if it has 0 wounds). The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}'s next three {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g} cost −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} less.
Until the end of combat, the Overseer's allies also ignore the {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g} of enemies that are {g|f:5fcfda67ccb14a66a0ff79d2b9ee250c}under surveillance{/g}. Additionally, allies within a 4-cell radius around the servo-skull swarm are immune to {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hits{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
L'essaim de servocrânes régénère immédiatement toute sa réserve de blessures (même s'il n'en a aucune). Le coût des trois prochaines capacités du surveillant est réduit de −1 PA.
Jusqu'à la fin du combat, les alliés du surveillant ignorent la couverture des ennemis {g|f:a115669547864ccc816f0598a404e816}sous surveillance{/g}. De plus, les alliés dans un rayon de 4 cases autour de l'essaim de servocrânes bénéficient d'une immunité contre les coups critiques.

languages.text:
完全恢复伺服头骨集群的{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}生命值{/g}（即便生命值为0也可以完全恢复）。{g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}监察官{/g}接下来的3个{g|Encyclopedia:Ability}能力{/g}，消耗的{g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}行动点数{/g}降低1点。
监察官的盟友攻击处于{g|f:5fcfda67ccb14a66a0ff79d2b9ee250c}一览无余{/g}状态的敌人时，也同样会无视目标的{g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}掩体{/g}效果，且距离伺服头骨集群4格范围内所有盟友都对{g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}暴击{/g}免疫。上述效果持续至战斗结束。
languages.original_text:
The servo-skull swarm immediately heals to full {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} (even if it has 0 wounds). The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}'s next three {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g} cost −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} less.
Until the end of combat, the Overseer's allies also ignore the {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g} of enemies that are {g|f:5fcfda67ccb14a66a0ff79d2b9ee250c}under surveillance{/g}. Additionally, allies within a 4-cell radius around the servo-skull swarm are immune to {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hits{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
完全恢复伺服头骨集群的生命值（即便生命值为0也可以完全恢复）。监察官接下来的3个能力，消耗的行动点数降低1点。
监察官的盟友攻击处于{g|f:a115669547864ccc816f0598a404e816}一览无余{/g}状态的敌人时，也同样会无视目标的掩体效果，且距离伺服头骨集群4格范围内所有盟友都对暴击免疫。上述效果持续至战斗结束。

languages.text:
El enjambre de servocráneos recupera inmediatamente todas las {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}heridas{/g} (aunque esté a 0 heridas). Las siguientes 3 {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}capacidades{/g} del {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}supervisor{/g} cuestan −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}PA{/g}.
Hasta el final del combate, los aliados del supervisor también ignoran la {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cobertura{/g} de enemigos {g|f:5fcfda67ccb14a66a0ff79d2b9ee250c}bajo vigilancia{/g}. Además, los aliados en un radio de 4 casillas del enjambre de servocráneos son inmunes a {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}impactos críticos{/g}.
languages.original_text:
The servo-skull swarm immediately heals to full {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} (even if it has 0 wounds). The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}'s next three {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g} cost −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} less.
Until the end of combat, the Overseer's allies also ignore the {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g} of enemies that are {g|f:5fcfda67ccb14a66a0ff79d2b9ee250c}under surveillance{/g}. Additionally, allies within a 4-cell radius around the servo-skull swarm are immune to {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hits{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
El enjambre de servocráneos recupera inmediatamente todas las heridas (aunque esté a 0 heridas). Las siguientes 3 capacidades del supervisor cuestan −1 PA.
Hasta el final del combate, los aliados del supervisor también ignoran la cobertura de enemigos {g|f:a115669547864ccc816f0598a404e816}bajo vigilancia{/g}. Además, los aliados en un radio de 4 casillas del enjambre de servocráneos son inmunes a impactos críticos.

languages.text:
サーヴォスカル・スウォームは即座に全快まで回復する（{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}傷{/g}が0の場合も）。{g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}監督官{/g}の次の3つの{g|Encyclopedia:Ability}アビリティ{/g}コストが-1{g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g}される。
戦闘終了まで、監督官の味方も{g|f:5fcfda67ccb14a66a0ff79d2b9ee250c}監督下{/g}の敵の{g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}遮蔽物{/g}を無視できる。さらに、サーヴォスカル・スウォームの半径4セル以内の味方は{g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}クリティカルヒット{/g}耐性を付与される。
languages.original_text:
The servo-skull swarm immediately heals to full {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} (even if it has 0 wounds). The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}'s next three {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g} cost −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} less.
Until the end of combat, the Overseer's allies also ignore the {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g} of enemies that are {g|f:5fcfda67ccb14a66a0ff79d2b9ee250c}under surveillance{/g}. Additionally, allies within a 4-cell radius around the servo-skull swarm are immune to {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hits{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
サーヴォスカル・スウォームは即座に全快まで回復する（傷が0の場合も）。監督官の次の3つのアビリティコストが-1APされる。
戦闘終了まで、監督官の味方も{g|f:a115669547864ccc816f0598a404e816}監督下{/g}の敵の遮蔽物を無視できる。さらに、サーヴォスカル・スウォームの半径4セル以内の味方はクリティカルヒット耐性を付与される。

languages.text:
Hizmelet sürüsü, anında iyileşerek tam sağlığına kavuşur ({g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}sağlık puanı{/g} 0 olsa bile). {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Gözetmen'in{/g} sonraki üç {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}kabiliyeti{/g} 1 puan daha az {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}EP{/g} harcar.
Çatışma sonuna dek Gözetmen'in dost birimleri de {g|f:5fcfda67ccb14a66a0ff79d2b9ee250c}gözetim altındaki{/g} düşmanların {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}siperlerini{/g} yok sayar. Ayrıca hizmelet sürüsünün etrafındaki 4 hücrelik yarıçap içinde bulunan dost birimler, {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}kritik vuruşlara{/g} karşı bağışıklık kazanır.
languages.original_text:
The servo-skull swarm immediately heals to full {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} (even if it has 0 wounds). The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}'s next three {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g} cost −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} less.
Until the end of combat, the Overseer's allies also ignore the {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g} of enemies that are {g|f:5fcfda67ccb14a66a0ff79d2b9ee250c}under surveillance{/g}. Additionally, allies within a 4-cell radius around the servo-skull swarm are immune to {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hits{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Hizmelet sürüsü, anında iyileşerek tam sağlığına kavuşur (sağlık puanı 0 olsa bile). Gözetmen'in sonraki üç kabiliyeti 1 puan daha az EP harcar.
Çatışma sonuna dek Gözetmen'in dost birimleri de {g|f:a115669547864ccc816f0598a404e816}gözetim altındaki{/g} düşmanların siperlerini yok sayar. Ayrıca hizmelet sürüsünün etrafındaki 4 hücrelik yarıçap içinde bulunan dost birimler, kritik vuruşlara karşı bağışıklık kazanır.

Hizmelet sürüsü, anında iyileşerek tam sağlığına kavuşur ({g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}sağlık puanı{/g} 0 olsa bile). {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Gözetmen{/g}'in sonraki üç {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}kabiliyeti{/g} 1 puan daha az EP harcar.
Çatışma sonuna dek Gözetmen'in dost birimleri de {g|f:a115669547864ccc816f0598a404e816}gözetim altındaki{/g} düşmanların siperlerini yok sayar. Ayrıca hizmelet sürüsünün etrafındaki 4 hücrelik yarıçap içinde bulunan dost birimler, {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}kritik vuruşlara{/g} karşı bağışıklık kazanır.
